FeedbackText: I feel underpaid and I do not see promotion opportunities.
My team is supportive and I like my work.
The workload is too high and work-life balance is difficult.
I want an internal transfer because this role no longer fits my goals.
Management communication is poor and I feel stressed.
I am happy with my career growth here.
I'm considering leaving due to stress and salary issues.
Micromanagement is becoming a real problem.
I enjoy the flexibility and projects I'm working on.
